title: FV Bardic Instruments
description: Discover a new gameplay possibilities with these area effect instruments
body:
This data pack adds a new utility to goat horns. Each type of goat horn becomes an instrument that applies area-of-effect effects. The instruments offer new, support-oriented, gameplay that's more effective in multiplayer, but they can also be useful in solo. 

Each instrument is obtained through custom crafting, with a goat horn and two iron ingots, following a specific pattern (pattern shown in the gallery).
These instruments are accessible from the early/mid game and are rather balanced accordingly.

Description of the effects of each instrument :

Charge Melody :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Increases attack and movement speed of allies for 6 seconds.
</details>

Cheerful Melody :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Grants 4 absorption hearts to allies for 6 seconds.
</details>

Soothing Melody :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Restores 3 HP in 6 seconds.
</details>

Iron will :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Grants damage reduction and slows allies for 6 seconds.
</details>

Melancholic Melody :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Applies a weakening melancholy to everyone.
</details>

Dissonance :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Hurts enemies and disrupts everyone
</details>

War Rhythm :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Increases allies’ attack, but they must keep pace.
</details>

Baleful Melody :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Surrounds everyone in consuming darkness, blinding, slowing, and dealing damage over time.
</details>

I hope you have fun with this new feature! ;)
(some additions will be coming soon)

Note that to download the resource pack, you must click on the datapack file name in the "Versions" or "Changelog" menu for the resource pack file to appear.

This data pack is inspired by PhilipL’s Goat Horn Enchantments data pack.
